perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a middle-aged man wearing glasses, a grey newsboy cap, and a black t-shirt standing in front of a store poster. He is gesturing with his right hand while speaking. (2) The scene transitions to the interior of an electronics store named 'miko', showing staff members behind counters and customers browsing. (3) The man is now inside the store, pointing to a large stack of white iPhone retail boxes on a table. (4) He presents a gold iPhone to a staff member, and a close-up shows a Casio calculator displaying the number '30000'. A fast-forward sequence shows the man and staff member interacting at the counter. (5) The camera pans across shelves filled with various smartphone cases and accessories. (6) The video concludes with the man back outside the store, holding an orange shopping bag and smiling as he speaks to the camera.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Energetic and upbeat electronic background music starts immediately. A male voice speaks in a friendly, enthusiastic, and high-pitched tone in Mandarin. (2) The music continues at a steady pace as the speaker transitions from outside to inside the store. (3) As the speaker highlights the phone boxes and the trade-in process, the vocal intensity remains high. A brief 'cha-ching' or digital bell sound effect is heard when the calculator price is shown. (4) The music remains consistent in the background until the end, with the male voice delivering a final call to action with a slightly rising inflection.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: Traditional Chinese subtitles appear at the bottom of the screen throughout the video, translating the speaker's dialogue. (2) Decorative/Hook Text: (A) 'iPhone到底要去哪買才有現貨又划算?' (Where to buy iPhone with stock and good value?) appears as a variety-show style caption at the start. (B) '推薦理由#1', '#2', '#3' (Recommendation reasons) appear as large, bold titles. (C) '現貨滿滿' (Full of stock), '舊換新' (Trade-in), '配件折200元' (Accessories 200 off) appear with a promotional tone.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main male creator, 2 male staff members, 1 female customer in background, 1 male customer.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: Middle-aged Asian male, wears glasses, a grey patterned newsboy cap, and a black T-shirt with 'OKX' and 'McLaren' logos.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The outdoor background includes a shop sign with city names (Taipei, Chiayi, Tainan). The indoor background features well-lit retail shelves, mobile phone display cases, and service counters.
visual_scene_and_style.lightingStyle: Bright studio-like indoor lighting and natural daylight.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video serves as a promotional advertisement for 'miko' mobile phone store. It uses a popular tech influencer to build trust, highlighting three key selling points: immediate availability of iPhone stock, high trade-in valuation for old phones, and discounts on accessories to drive customer traffic.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The speaker explicitly names 'miko' as his top choice, walks into the store, and demonstrates their specific services (trade-in, stock, discounts).

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: 3c有意思Tim哥 branding, specific energetic delivery style, and 'OKX McLaren' branded apparel.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video targets consumers looking for iPhones in Taiwan, emphasizing price and convenience through the influencer's persona.
